evals.name: trigger-create-skill
evals.prompt: Create a new skill that documents our Stripe payment integration patterns

assertions.text: Guides through the create/eval/iterate workflow, scaffolds a SKILL.md with valid frontmatter (third-person description, concrete triggers, anti-triggers) and respects the description budget

evals.name: trigger-improve-description
evals.prompt: The vue-ssr-auth skill never seems to trigger — help me rewrite its description

assertions.text: Applies description best practices (discriminating keywords, third-person, Don't-use-for anti-triggers) and verifies length against the budget rather than editing skill body content

evals.name: negative-add-translation
evals.prompt: Add a translation key for the new notifications page

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger skill-creator; this is an i18n task that belongs to the translate skill/agent
